user_message: Can you write a function that parses pasted content references from text?
assistant_message:
I'll help you with that. Here's the implementation:

```typescript
export function parseReferences(input: string): Array<{ id: number; match: string; index: number }> {
  const referencePattern = /\[(Pasted text|Image|\.\.\.Truncated text) #(\d+)(?: \+\d+ lines)?(\.)*\]/g
  const matches = [...input.matchAll(referencePattern)]
  return matches
    .map(match => ({
      id: parseInt(match[2] || '0'),
      match: match[0],
      index: match.index,
    }))
    .filter(match => match.id > 0)
}
```

This function uses a regex pattern to find all pasted content references in the format [Pasted text #N] or [Image #N].

turns.content: Write a function to implement an LRU cache
How does the get method work?

The get method: 1) Returns undefined if key doesn't exist, 2) If found, it removes the entry and re-adds it at the end (most recently used position), 3) This keeps the access order correct for eviction.

  height: number

reset(width: number, height: number, screen: Screen): void {

  this.height = height
  this.screen = screen
  this.operations.length = 0
  resetScreen(screen, width, height)
}

metadata.input:
export function isWideCharacter(code: number): boolean {
  return (
    (code >= 0x1100 &&
      (code <= 0x115f ||
        code === 0x2329 ||
        code === 0x232a ||
        (code >= 0x2e80 && code <= 0x303f) ||
        (code >= 0x3040 && code <= 0xa4cf) ||
        (code >= 0xac00 && code <= 0xd7a3) ||
        (code >= 0xf900 && code <= 0xfaff) ||
        (code >= 0xfe10 && code <= 0xfe1f) ||
        (code >= 0xfe30 && code <= 0xfe6f) ||
        (code >= 0xff00 && code <= 0xff60) ||
        (code >= 0xffe0 && code <= 0xffe6) ||
        (code >= 0x20000 && code <= 0x2fffd) ||
        (code >= 0x30000 && code <= 0x3fffd)))
  )
}

metadata.input:
export function snakeCase(str: string): string {
  return str
    .replace(/([A-Z])/g, '_$1')
    .replace(/\s+/g, '_')
    .replace(/^_/, '')
    .toLowerCase()
}

export function kebabCase(str: string): string {
  return str
    .replace(/([A-Z])/g, '-$1')
    .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-/, '')
    .toLowerCase()
}

metadata.input:
export function slugify(str: string): string {
  return str
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim()
    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
}
